summary: [deterministic] all deterministic checks passed for engineering-vllm-inference-blueprint | [judge] Deployment approval is blocked. I could not perform primary repository inspection or independently execute the required validation commands in this session because every available local execution path failed before any repo command started. Without direct code inspection and local proof of the streaming HTTP behavior, request deserialization, SSE framing, and quality gates, I will not approve production deployment based only on an implementation worker's self-report.

findings.title: Primary repository inspection was impossible in this review session
findings.body: I could not inspect the changed Rust handler, request types, or tests. Both shell execution and the Node REPL failed at sandbox startup, so I could not verify whether `ChatCompletionRequest` deserializes `stream`, whether the handler branches correctly on `stream=true`, whether the upstream body is proxied incrementally, or whether non-streaming behavior remains unchanged.
findings.evidence: `git status --short`, `git diff --stat`, `rg ...`, `pwd`, `ls`, and `true` all failed before execution with `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`. `js_repl` also exited immediately with the same `bwrap` error.

findings.title: Required quality gates were not independently proven
findings.body: The deploy gates in the success criteria require `cargo test --workspace` and `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` to pass. I was unable to run those commands in this session, so lint cleanliness, test pass status, and warning-free status remain unproven at review time.
findings.evidence: No local command execution path worked. The only passing evidence available is the implementation worker's report claiming: `cargo fmt --all -- --check` pass, `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings` pass, and `cargo test --workspace` pass with 18 tests. That is not independent verification.

findings.title: Streaming wire-format success criteria remain unverified at review time
findings.evidence: I could not open or search the repository files, and I could not run the HTTP-layer tests. The only available claim is the worker summary that the streaming branch and SSE framing were implemented and tested.

evidence.label: stdout
Shell runtime failure
evidence.value: All attempted shell commands failed before execution with `bwrap: loopback: Failed RTM_NEWADDR: Operation not permitted`.

evidence.label: REPL runtime failure
evidence.value: `js_repl` also failed to start and reported the same `bwrap` sandbox error, so direct filesystem inspection was unavailable.

evidence.label: Worker-reported gates
evidence.value: Prior worker output claims `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`, and `cargo test --workspace` all passed, with 18 tests total.

evidence.label: Success-criteria audit
evidence.value: Every required criterion remains unverified in this session: request deserialization of `stream`, streaming branch activation, incremental proxying without full buffering, SSE `data: {json}\n\n` framing, terminal `[DONE]`, non-streaming behavior preservation, appropriate `text/event-stream` semantics, deterministic HTTP-layer streaming test coverage, and workspace test/lint gates.
